appraisal_events.evidence: Je ne pus même pas trouver un après-midi pour aller à Doncières voir Robert de Saint-Loup, comme je le lui avais promis.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator reports failing to keep a promised visit to Saint-Loup, effectively sidelining him in favor of time with the young girls.

status_effects.explanation: Locally excluded by the narrator’s broken promise and lack of availability.
